name: player_espn_overall_score range year_offset averages REG only, excluding POST (executed-result parity)
description: Seed one player with 2024 REG (50), 2024 POST (99), and 2025 REG (70) espn_overall_score, then run player_espn_overall_score with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. The result must AVG the REG window only (60), excluding the POST row -- proving the extra_predicates gate fix reapplies the seas_type discriminator that the prior trust-branch silently dropped for this real-table-no-alias source. If seas_type were ignored, the POST 99 would pull the average to 73.
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, (SELECT AVG(player_seasonlogs.espn_overall_score) FROM player_seasonlogs WHERE player_seasonlogs.pid = player.pid AND player_seasonlogs.year IN (2024,2025) AND player_seasonlogs.seas_type = 'REG') AS "espn_overall_score_0", "player"."pos" from "player" where player.pos IN ('ZZ') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, fname, lname, pname, formatted, pos, pos1, dob, nfl_draft_year) VALUES ('TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01', 'Test', 'Espn', 'T.Espn', 'Test Espn', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020)
INSERT INTO player_seasonlogs (pid, year, seas_type, pos, espn_overall_score) VALUES ('TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01', 2024, 'REG', 'ZZ', 50)
INSERT INTO player_seasonlogs (pid, year, seas_type, pos, espn_overall_score) VALUES ('TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01', 2024, 'POST', 'ZZ', 99)
INSERT INTO player_seasonlogs (pid, year, seas_type, pos, espn_overall_score) VALUES ('TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01', 2025, 'REG', 'ZZ', 70)
result_equivalence.reference_sql: SELECT AVG(espn_overall_score) AS espn_overall_score_0 FROM player_seasonlogs WHERE pid = 'TEST-ESPN-2000-2000-01-01' AND year IN (2024, 2025) AND seas_type = 'REG'
